sections.one_line: Integration turns cohort outputs and context into the briefing presence sees, filtering restricted material
Schema for the frozen briefing artifact: context, action, presence directive, and audit trace
Schema for cohort adapter outputs used by integration, audit, and redaction rules
Named runtime phases and their instrumentation in the Kernos loop
Iterative retrieval loop that gathers info or finalizes the briefing
Integration depth limits and timeout guardrails for iterations, summaries, filters, and tokens
Minimal respond_only briefing used when integration fails, with failure audits and cause notes.
Audit records for integration briefing runs, with success/error status and briefing references
Where Kernos integration code lives and how the runner is wired for later use
Follow-on specs that target this primitive contract
